title: Hand Magic: Renewed
body:
![Hand magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f53483d7a7c5020f885b84284a6a0ce9320dae4.png)

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ac0d543d6aaa18cd88e51b5f0efe8325f1cc56.png)

**The Hand Magic: Renewed brings an interesting and immersive spell-casting experience to Minecraft. Dive into a world where hand gestures, mystical scrolls, and ancient rituals unlock the secrets of powerful magic. Manage your mana through sustenance and explore a plethora of spells to dominate your world.**

---

This is an renewed & enchanced version of original mod that was lost due to corupted files!
 - [Original Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hand-magic)

---

**Unique Spell Casting System**

- Hand Gestures: Perform intricate hand gestures to cast spells, adding a dynamic and interactive layer to your magic use.
  
- Scrolls: Discover scrolls that hold ancient knowledge, allowing you to learn and cast powerful spells.

**Mana System**

- Regenerate Through Food: Mana is tied to your sustenance. The more you eat, the faster your mana regenerates, adding a strategic layer to resource management.

**Rituals and Runes**

- Runic Rituals: Unlock hidden spells and powerful effects by performing complex rituals using runes. Each ritual requires careful preparation and knowledge of ancient symbols.
  
**Extensive Spell Collection**

- 31 Spells: Master a diverse array of 31 unique spells, each with its own distinct effects and uses. That's all locked at first but with exploring the world you will find preparations and research pages of different spells!
  
---
The Hand Magic: Renewed Mod transforms your Minecraft experience, adding depth, strategy, and a touch of mysticism to your adventures. Master the art of spell casting, manage your resources wisely, and unlock the secrets of ancient magic to become the ultimate sorcerer.

---

Mod is translated to:

English

---

Also there is datapack compactability with this mod! So you can make your own spells, rituals and etc.

 - [guide on how to make datapack for this mod!](https://github.com/jenki258/hand_magic_renewed)

---
Also can be found on:
 - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hand-magic-renewed)
